author: audit-agent

patch.value: UX: Telemetry shows 84 'No update flags provided' errors - improve guidance

Telemetry analysis shows 84 occurrences of 'No update flags provided' error. Users call pm update <ID> without specifying what to change. The error message should proactively suggest common flags (--status, --description, --body, --tags). Additionally 70 errors for 'Invalid --status value closed' - users try --status closed instead of pm close. And 56 errors for 'Item undefined not found' suggesting a caller passes no ID.

message: UX finding from telemetry error analysis

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: UX improvements from audit: (1) Error guidance for --status closed already redirects to pm close with examples. (2) No update flags error already has clear guidance listing common flags. (3) Enhanced 'Item undefined not found' to detect placeholder IDs (undefined/null/<template>) and suggest checking variable resolution before calling pm. These address the top 3 telemetry error patterns (85+73+56=214 events).

patch.value: Enhanced error guidance for top 3 telemetry error patterns: placeholder ID detection (undefined/null), --status closed redirect, and no-flags error. 214 telemetry events addressed.

author: audit-agent
